titleStmt.title: SII 19.265: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 265. (A.R. No. 429 of 1921.) TIRUVEṆṆAINALLŪR, TIRUKKOYILUR TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT. ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE maṇḍapa IN FRONT OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, KṚIPĀPURĪŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This inscription is worn out by weather and is also built in. It registers a sale of land made tax-free by the sabhā of Tiruveṇṇainaḷḷūr for the price and tax amounts received by them, to one Aparāyitaṉ-Uttamasōḻa-Mārāyaṉ of Perumūr for being endowed by him to the temple as dēvadāna. This is a record of Uttama-Chōḷa.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kopparakecari paṉmaṟku yāṇṭu 10vatu tiruveṇṇainallū pārayitaṉ Uttamacoḻamārāyanpakkal sabhaiyom vilaipporuḷ Iṟaipporuḷ koṇṭu Eṅkaḷur po lapa teṟkil kollai Iṟaiyiliyāka viṟṟukkuṭutta kollaikkuk kiḻpāṟkkellai vāṉavaṉ mātevivatik
�ṟṟaṉūr Ellaikku vaṭakkum melpāṟke ṉāriṭapperu vaḻikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai paḷḷattūmpukkut teṟkum Uṭpaṭṭa nilam Oḻiyāmal kuḷamum kuḻiyum viṟṟukkuṭuttom tiruveṇṇainallūr sabhaiyom tevatāṉamākak koṇṭu kuṭutteṉ perumūraparāyitaṉ Uttamacoḻamārāyaṉeṉ piḷḷai
ṇṭu tevatāṉamākak kuṭutteṉ Itu paṉmāheśvararakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 19.265 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
